name: sayso
product: Statement caps — one-liners you wear on your head
audience: Women in their 20s-30s who communicate in screenshots: dating-app carnage, situationship humor, self-aware chaos, deadpan confidence. They buy the cap because it says the thing they were already thinking.
voice: Unhinged but in control. Deadpan. A punchline, never a caption. Zero corporate, zero inspirational. Occasionally filthy, always clever. Lowercase. The joke does everything.
registers: rock bottom, reframed as a flex
voice_examples: i'm not justin. i won't say sorry. i'll block you.
biggest mistake: i gave my heart to someone who needed a brain
if it doesn't bring me inspiration, income, or orgasms, i don't have time for it
been to more gates than dates this year
when i said i liked it rough i don't mean my entire life
life sucks but i suck better
fall in love with your problems, maybe they will leave you too
me adding geologist to my resume after hitting rock bottom
a gf is temporary. being a hot ex is forever
here's a rock from the rock bottom i hit
my mama don't like you. and she likes everyone
single by choice. maybe just not my choice.
I ran a background check on myself. wouldn't date me either.
he said I was hard to love. skill issue.
my type is emotionally unavailable and 6 feet from reaching his potential
emotionally I'm at capacity. physically I'm at brunch.
I don't have exes, I have case studies
I didn't get rejected. I got redirected to better.
delusion is just confidence that hasn't been proven right yet
I gave him the best 2-3 weeks of my life
my ex is my ex because I have executive function
he wanted a trophy wife. I wanted a trophy life. one of us got what they wanted.
if I'm too much go find less
karma is like 69. you get what you give.
hey siri, turn off my feelings forever
dont: sound like a brand or explain the joke
use hashtags inside the on-image text
be crude just to be crude — filthy must also be clever
